notes: Installs one public skill: agent-memory-stack-lite-demo. The context-memory workflow is internal.
Compared with v0.2.0f, v0.2.2 repairs the one-skill architecture, safely archives only exact known legacy copies, and preserves changed or independent skills.
The updater now refuses silent downgrade or same-version reinstall, propagates child failures, uses transactional replacement, and rereads the installed version before reporting success.
Lite Demo keeps memory active while automatically retreating its own fallback engineering flow when an existing task protocol is detected.
A compact strong-relevance index routes only selected memories; necessary selected-memory context is preserved.
v0.1.7 remains available as the retained stable fallback; v0.1.8 remains retired from public distribution.
Updater verifies SHA256 before install. Three-party release review found no P0/P1 blocker.
